summary: Full backend + frontend UI regression testing after CSS/HTML redesign of drilling-report-parser. 14/14 backend API tests pass. Frontend: login flow, workspace sidebar (3 groups, 9 menu items with new SVG mask icons), drilling detail (KPI cards, panels, rules panel), Save/Download buttons, admin console (8 nav sections, account CRUD form) all render and function correctly under new modern minimalist theme (dark slate sidebar #0B1220, primary blue #0F52BA, Chivo + IBM Plex Sans fonts loading).
action_items: (Optional) Admin console (/admin/) has no language switcher (中/EN/ES) in header — only workspace has it. If i18n on admin is a goal, add lang buttons there.
(Optional) Login button is not type='submit' (uses <button> with click handler). Adding type='submit' would improve accessibility & Enter-key submit.
critical_code_review_comments: styles.css uses well-organised CSS variable token system (:root) — good.
form_server.py is pure http.server; fine but consider FastAPI native routes long-term. Not in scope of this UI change.
Auth session is in-memory — supervisor restart invalidates sessions (documented in memory/test_credentials.md, acceptable for this app).
seed_data_creation: One TEST_ prefixed drilling report saved via /api/save-report during test (well_name=TEST_WELL_PCNC-040).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API endpoints: /api/records (list), /api/save-report (POST, requires report_type), /api/download-database (xlsx), /api/production-summary, /api/npt-stats, /api/admin/{login,users,session,config,roles,project-teams,data-status,audit-logs}. Use public URL from frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Login button selector: button:has-text('登录'). Login input: input[name='username'], input[name='password']. Sidebar groups auto-expanded on load; menu items reachable via text selector.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. UI redesign is visually clean, functionally intact, all APIs proxy correctly through FastAPI to form_server on 8090.
